race.comment: ADDITION (7) put the writing on the wall last start when he powered home to be beaten just half a length by subsequent winner Lupine over 1600m at this track. Will appreciate the step up in distance now and is ready to peak at the third run back, particularly on his return to midweek racing. GREY NORTHERN (3) made a mid-race move to find the lead then went right on with the job last time out over 1890m at Toowoomba. Needs a bit of luck from a tricky gate but should hold that form at just the fourth run of the campaign. PISTON REBEL (8) savaged the line to be beaten just a length when second-up over the mile here recently. Scored a comfortable win third-up last prep so there should be more improvement in store. SAVEUR (11) is racing in great heart, narrowly missing the hat trick last start when edged out in the same race as ADDITION. One of the key contenders. PROPOSE (10) finished midfield here on Saturday but can bounce back in this easier contest.
